overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy rural landscape at dusk. The character traverses a forest trail with wildlife, crosses a historic stone bridge with burning torches, and emerges into open grasslands with distant snow-capped mountains visible under storm clouds.

events.description: herd of goats crosses the path from left to right ahead of the character

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding forest trail

notable_agents.action: goats running across the dirt path from left to right

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail winding through dense forest
dense coniferous forest forming dark backdrop
dense coniferous forest lining the path
low crumbling stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at dusk. A herd of goats crosses the path ahead, moving from left to right. The trail is bordered by a low stone wall on the right and dense pine trees on both sides, creating an enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone bridge with burning torches

events.description: exiting forest trail and entering stone bridge structure with ramparts
transitioning from cobblestone to wooden bridge planks with audible creaking

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the stone bridge, moving from forest to open countryside

entered.detail: tall stone wall with wooden railings forming bridge side
tall stone wall with wooden railings forming bridge side
stone pillar topped with burning flame providing warm light
stone pillar topped with burning flame providing warm light
weathered wooden planks forming the bridge deck over water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a historic stone bridge marked by burning torches on stone pillars. Geralt walks across cobblestone and wooden planks, passing between high stone ramparts. The enclosed bridge structure creates a brief sheltered passage before opening to the countryside beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountain vista

events.description: exiting bridge structure into open field landscape with expansive sky
distant lightning flashes visible in storm clouds over snow-capped mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through open meadows toward distant mountains under stormy skies

entered.detail: massive snow-capped mountain range visible under dark storm clouds
open grassy field with tall grass and wildflowers
open grassy field stretching to the horizon
sparse individual trees dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the bridge into wide-open grasslands. The landscape opens dramatically to reveal distant snow-capped mountains under a stormy sky. Lightning flashes in the clouds as the character walks along a dirt path through the meadow, with scattered trees and expansive fields replacing the dense forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an enclosed, shadowy forest into a vast, storm-swept mountain landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a low stone wall and dense pine trees, where a herd of goats crosses the path. As the trail leads forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered passage across a historic stone bridge, moving over cobblestones and wooden planks between high ramparts lit by burning torches. The environment then opens dramatically as the character emerges from the bridge into wide-open grasslands and expansive fields. Finally, the view expands to reveal distant snow-capped mountains under a stormy sky, with flashes of lightning illuminating the horizon as the path winds through the meadow.
